name: Sabre REST API
description: Sabre is a leading technology provider to the global travel and tourism industry. The Sabre REST API provides programmatic access to Sabre's Global Distribution System (GDS), enabling travel agencies, airlines, hoteliers, and other travel companies to search, book, and manage travel content. This specification covers air shopping (including Bargain Finder Max and NDC-enabled offers), booking management (PNR creation and modification), ticketing, order management, hotel and car availability, utility/reference-data lookups, fare monitoring (FareNabber), and trip proposal workflows. Authentication uses OAuth 2.0 with both client_credentials and password grant types.
